mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fx_xr_inf ( CCY_PAIR, CHANNEL_CD, BUY_PRICE, SELL_PRICE, BL_PRICE, OP_CTE, DT_CTE, TM_CTE, OP_UTE, DT_UTE, TM_UTE, DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, DELI_TYP, UTC_TIMES ) VALUES ( #{e.ccyPair}, #{e.channelCd}, #{e.buyPrice}, #{e.sellPrice}, #{e.blPrice}, #{opCode}, #{today}, #{now}, #{opCode}, #{today}, #{now}, #{e.dtChannelPublish}, #{e.tmChannelPublish}, #{e.deliTyp}, #{e.utcTimes} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
BUY_PRICE = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(BUY_PRICE), BUY_PRICE), SELL_PRICE = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(SELL_PRICE), SELL_PRICE), BL_PRICE = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(BL_PRICE), BL_PRICE), OP_UTE = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(OP_UTE), OP_UTE), DT_UTE = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(DT_UTE), DT_UTE), TM_UTE = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_UTE), TM_UTE), UTC_TIMES = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(UTC_TIMES), UTC_TIMES), DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH = IF(CONCAT(VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)) >= CONCAT(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH, TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)
BUY_PRICE = VALUES(BUY_PRICE), SELL_PRICE = VALUES(SELL_PRICE), BL_PRICE = VALUES(BL_PRICE), OP_UTE = VALUES(OP_UTE), DT_UTE = VALUES(DT_UTE), TM_UTE = VALUES(TM_UTE), UTC_TIMES = VALUES(UTC_TIMES), DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH = VALUES(DT_CHANNEL_PUBLISH), TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH = VALUES(TM_CHANNEL_PUBLISH)
